title: Feds Try Secret Grand Jury to Unmask Reddit ICE Critic
description: An ICE summons to get the user’s identity failed. Advocates worry the move to a grand jury signals an escalation of the war on dissent.

summaryHistory.summary: “It’s something to be taken very seriously.” The convening of a federal grand jury presents a considerable challenge for Reddit in particular, a platform that prides itself on protecting the free speech rights of its 121 million daily users. Failed Attempt The story of how Reddit became ensnared ...
